title: citrus × humilis
intro: Citrus × humilis, also known as the yuzu, is a hybrid citrus plant that originated in East Asia, resulting from the cross between a sour orange and a grapefruit. The medicinal properties of Citrus × humilis include its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and limonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of yuzu are numerous, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and enhance digestion, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Citrus × humilis include juice, oil, and tea, which can be used separately or in combination to harness its medicinal properties, and it is often used in aromatherapy and culinary applications.
